Step 3 [Calculation]: Set $LN = LO$ to find $x$: $x + 3 = 4x - 9 \Rightarrow 12 = 3x \Rightarrow x = 4$. Thus, $LN = LO = 4 + 3 = 7$. Using the theorem, $KN = KM = 7$ and $JM = JO = 12$. The side lengths are $JK = 12 + 7 = 19$, $KL = 7 + 7 = 14$, and $JL = 12 + 7 = 19$. The perimeter is $19 + 14 + 19 = 52$.

Step 4 [Final Conclusion]: \boxed{52}
